text: Welcome. This is your Signal Mirror — a reflection of how you moved through today.
Pick the word that best captures your day:
What drove things forward?
What slowed things down?
options: Unclear direction|Waiting on others|Low energy|Too many obstacles
answer=Unclear direction|Waiting on others:S1_EXT;answer=Low energy|Too many obstacles:S1_PASS

text: When things shifted, how did you respond?
What influenced your progress most?
What was your first reaction?
How did your energy feel?
You actively shaped your day. Even small actions reinforced your sense of control.
Your progress was shared between you and external factors. Not everything was in your hands — but some of it was.
The day felt driven by outside forces. Even then, there were moments where choice was still available.
Your energy pulled inward today. Recognizing that is the first step toward regaining direction.
